creator: ahd@kew.com
text:
Upgrade option for FreeBSD 2.2.6 restored a number of files to
	/etc for me, but omitted was newsyslog.conf.  This of course
	caused my changes to it be lost.

	One suspects a quick review of all the files in /etc may be in
	order to see if they need to be restored, I can see how the list
	would fall out of date.

Fix: 

Restore newsyslog.conf from backup.  (Backup?  What backup?)
How-To-Repeat: 
	Customize newsyslog.conf and then upgrade from 2.2.1 to 2.2.6
